dsl_rule.translation_notes: Dark Cloud Cover pattern operationalized as: (1) price above SMA_50 indicating uptrend, (2) gap up from prior high (close > prev_high), (3) large body relative to volatility suggesting strong prior candle, (4) close near day's low (lower_wick minimal). Exit on reversal when close crosses above prior close. Pattern rank 22/103 suggests moderate reliability; conservative hold of 5 days and 2% stop loss applied.

source_rule_text: Dark Cloud Cover: Pattern begins in upward price trend with a tall white candle, followed by a gap open higher than prior day's peak, then bears take over with selling pressure closing price near day's low
